name: aws-static-site-checklist-generator
description: Generate security- and operations-focused readiness checklists for AWS S3 and CloudFront static sites.

scripts.lint: node --check src/generate-checklist.js && node --check src/domain/checklist.js && node --check src/application/generate-checklist.js && node --check src/infrastructure/filesystem.js && node --check src/observability/logger.js
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm test && npm run coverage
